mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product(product_name, category_id, price, stock, unit, barcode, image_url, status) VALUES(#{productName}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{unit}, #{barcode}, #{imageUrl}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET stock = stock + #{quantity} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select:
SELECT p.*, c.category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.status = 1
AND (p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.barcode LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.product_id
